Operation 'unsubscribeCandidate' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical details about what input is required (candidate ID), what the operation returns, and important side effects (permanent unsubscribe, no future communications). data.description_suggestion: Unsubscribe a candidate from all communications. Requires the candidate ID in the request body. Once unsubscribed, the candidate will no longer receive research invitations or communications from the platform. Returns confirmation of the unsubscribe action. This operation is permanent unless the candidate is manually re-subscribed.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical details about what input is required (candidate ID), what the operation returns, and important side effects (permanent unsubscribe, no future communications). Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and consequences.

message: Operation 'bulkUpdateCandidatesPatch' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too vague and doesn't explain PATCH semantics or what the operation actually does. Added clarity about partial updates, input format expectations, return value, and the key difference between PATCH and PUT for AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Perform partial updates on multiple candidates in a single request using PATCH semantics. Accepts a bulk request containing an array of candidate objects with only the fields to be updated. Only provided fields are modified; omitted fields remain unchanged. Returns the count of successfully updated candidates and any errors encountered. Partial updates allow selective field modification without affecting other candidate attributes.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague and doesn't explain PATCH semantics or what the operation actually does. Added clarity about partial updates, input format expectations, return value, and the key difference between PATCH and PUT for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'bulkUpdateCandidatesPut' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity about PUT semantics and what the operation expects. Added explanation of full replacement behavior, input requirements, return value, and guidance on when to use PUT versus PATCH to help AI agents choose the correct operation.

data.description_suggestion: Perform full replacements on multiple candidates in a single request using PUT semantics. Accepts a bulk request containing an array of complete candidate objects. All fields must be provided; omitted fields may be cleared or set to defaults. Returns the count of successfully updated candidates and any errors encountered. Use PUT for complete candidate record replacement; use PATCH for partial updates.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about PUT semantics and what the operation expects. Added explanation of full replacement behavior, input requirements, return value, and guidance on when to use PUT versus PATCH to help AI agents choose the correct operation.

message: Operation 'bulkCreateCandidates' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description doesn't explain upsert behavior, input format, or what the operation returns. Enhanced description clarifies the create-or-update logic, return value structure, and use case to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Create new candidates or update existing ones in bulk using upsert semantics. Accepts a bulk request containing an array of candidate objects. If a candidate with the same ID exists, it will be updated; otherwise, a new candidate is created. Returns the count of created and updated candidates separately, plus any errors encountered. Useful for syncing candidate databases from external sources.
data.reasoning: Description doesn't explain upsert behavior, input format, or what the operation returns. Enhanced description clarifies the create-or-update logic, return value structure, and use case to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently delete multiple candidates in a single request. Accepts a bulk delete request containing an array of candidate IDs to remove.
